title: Ink jet ink composition
abstract: An ink jet ink composition includes a coloring material, a water-soluble organic solvent, and water. The coloring material contains a compound (A) having Cr (chromium) as Me in a structure represented by formula (1) below, and a compound (B) having Co (cobalt) as Me in the structure represented by the formula (1) below, and the mass ratio of the compound (B) to the compound (A) is over 0 and 0.06 or less.
claims: 1. An ink jet ink composition comprising: a coloring material; a water-soluble organic solvent; and water, wherein the coloring material contains a compound (A) having Cr as Me in a structure represented by formula (1) below, and a compound (B) having Co as Me in the structure represented by the formula (1) below; and the mass ratio of the compound (B) to the compound (A) is over 0 and 0.06 or less
